2” longer than an average curling iron, this award-winning tool gives you more to love!


Additional Information


The extended length barrel quickly creates loose, modern curls and waves and makes it easier to style long hair, or style the back sections on shorter styles. The combination of Nanonioc MX and Bio Ionic Moisturizing Heat(R) Technology lock in moisture, seal the cuticle, and ensure curls last long, and stay conditioned and bouncy instead of dull and limp.




How to Use


The extended barrel design allows you to curl the back of your head easier whether the hair is short or long.






Specs and Features


Silicone Speed Strips: No
Ceramic Mineral Complex: Yes
BioCeramic MCH Heater: No
PTC Heater: Yes
Far Infrared Heat: Yes
Adjustable Heat: Yes
Swivel Cord: Yes
Automatic Shut-Off: 1 hour
Wattage Rating: 73
Temperature: 430
Weight (without cord): 10 oz (1") / 11 oz (1.25")
Cord Length: 9 ft
Warranty Length: 1 Year Warranty
Universal Voltage: No

Technology
NanoIonic MX
The Healthiest Way to Style
NanoIonic™ MX micronizes water molecules so they can penetrate the hair, leaving it moisturized and conditioned. Keeps strands hydrated even with continuous use, for irresistibly silky and smooth locks.
